---
title: "pairedcov"
generated: true
description: "Cross-covariance between two sets of variables."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.covariance`](../nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:pairedcov -->
```python
pairedcov(X: Num[Array, '... c obs'], Y: Num[Array, '... d obs'], *, rowvar: bool = True, bias: bool = False, ddof: Optional[int] = None, weights: Optional[Num[Array, '... obs']] = None, weight_matrix: Optional[Num[Array, '... obs obs']] = None, l2: float = 0.0) -> Num[Array, '... c d']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:pairedcov -->
Cross-covariance between two sets of variables.

Same semantics as `cov` but with two separate variable
blocks `X` and `Y` sharing the same observation axis.  The
result is the rectangular block of covariances between every
variable of `X` and every variable of `Y`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:pairedcov -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` × `c` × `obs` | — | First variable block; observations along the observation axis. |
| `Y` | `Num` | `...` × `d` × `obs` | — | Second variable block, sharing the observation axis with `X`. |
| `rowvar` | `bool` | — | `True` | If `True` (default), the observation axis is the last axis; pass `False` to flip. |
| `bias` | `bool` | — | `False` | If `True`, divide by $n$; otherwise by $n - 1$. Ignored if `ddof` is given. |
| `ddof` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | Explicit degrees-of-freedom override. `None` means `int(not bias)`. |
| `weights` | `Optional[Num[Array, '... obs']]` | — | `None` | Per-observation vector weights. Mutually exclusive with `weight_matrix`. |
| `weight_matrix` | `Optional[Num[Array, '... obs obs']]` | — | `None` | Full observation-coupling matrix. Must be symmetric for the result to be a valid covariance. Mutually exclusive with `weights`. |
| `l2` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Ridge regularisation strength; `l2 > 0` adds $\lambda I$ when the result is square. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `c` × `d`. Cross-covariance block, `(..., c, d)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:pairedcov -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
